text:

Author: arrowd

Log:
  devel/stack: Disable AESNI when building cryptonite library.

  This Haskell library contains C code, which uses advanced instructions not present in older amd64 CPUs.

  PR:		247288
  Reported by:	pmueller@occsilva.de
  MFH:		2020Q2
